events.name: STEER_LEFT
events.description: Steer the skier one cell left (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: STEER_RIGHT
events.description: Steer the skier one cell right (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Fires when the run ends in defeat or three runs are completed.

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trees, rocks and slalom gates on the course
